description_long: This is a large, red, industrial-style barrel with a polygonal, faceted exterior and three prominent horizontal reinforcement rings encircling its body. The barrel has a flat, octagonal top with a small, round, black cap or bung located off-center. Its surface is matte and appears to be made of durable plastic, giving it a robust and weather-resistant look. One side of the barrel features a black flame hazard symbol, indicating it may be used for storing flammable materials. The barrel lacks any visible handles or spouts, and its base mirrors the top's octagonal shape. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban or industrial environments, such as construction sites, warehouses, or alleys.
description: A large, red, faceted plastic barrel with three reinforcement rings and a black flame hazard symbol on one side. It has a flat top with a small black cap and no visible handles.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with its flat, octagonal top and a small black cap visible near the edge; no markings are present on this side.
description_view_1: This view displays the barrel's top and body without any visible symbols or markings, emphasizing its faceted structure and reinforcement rings.
description_view_2: The front of the barrel is shown, featuring a prominent black flame hazard symbol on the side, along with the black cap on top.
description_view_3: The barrel is seen from the opposite side of the symbol, showing only the red surface, reinforcement rings, and the black cap on top.
